name: Szechuan Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 or 2 green peppers, cut into strips
1 or 2 carrots, finely shredded into matchsticks
1 scallion, quartered lengthwise, then cut into 3-inch long pieces
1 pound beef (round or chuck), cut into fine slivers or strips (works best if frozen first)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry the green peppers, carrots, and scallion for 1 to 2 minutes.
2. Push aside and stir-fry the beef slivers for 1 to 2 minutes.
3. Recombine the vegetables and add the remaining ingredients.
4. Stir and heat thoroughly.
5. Serve immediately with rice. Serves: 4
